rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.034, which governs audiology services eligibility under the school health program. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 38.034. SCHOOL HEALTH AND RELATED SERVICES PROGRAM; ELIGIBILITY FOR AUDIOLOGY SERVICES.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns an unrelated education/health statute.
